news.title:
IRB Infra projects robust toll growth and new asset acquisitions.
The company outlines significant expansion plans for FY27.
news.summary:
IRB Infra projects robust toll growth and new asset acquisitions.
The company outlines significant expansion plans for FY27.

news.title:
IRB Infra reports 21% YoY toll revenue growth in Mar'26 at Rs.783 cr.
FY26 toll revenue hits Rs.8,323 cr, capturing 10% of India's toll market.
news.summary:
IRB Infra reports 21% YoY toll revenue growth in Mar'26 at Rs.783 cr.
FY26 toll revenue hits Rs.8,323 cr, capturing 10% of India's toll market.

news.title:
India Ratings revised IRB Infrastructure's outlook to Positive from Stable.
IRB's bank loan facilities rated IND AA with a Positive outlook; NCD rating withdrawn.
news.summary:
India Ratings revised IRB Infrastructure's outlook to Positive from Stable.
IRB's bank loan facilities rated IND AA with a Positive outlook; NCD rating withdrawn.

news.title:
IRB Infra starts tolling on NH 16's Chandikhole-Bhadrak section from April 1, 2026.
SPV paid Rs.3,087 crore upfront to NHAI; toll rights secured for 20 years.
news.summary:
IRB Infra starts tolling on NH 16's Chandikhole-Bhadrak section from April 1, 2026.
SPV paid Rs.3,087 crore upfront to NHAI; toll rights secured for 20 years.

news.title:
IRB Infra shares trade ex-bonus from March 30; record date set for April 1.
Bonus issue ratio is 1:1; stock price adjusts accordingly; shares ended 0.8% lower at ₹40.8.
news.summary:
IRB Infra shares trade ex-bonus from March 30; record date set for April 1.
Bonus issue ratio is 1:1; stock price adjusts accordingly; shares ended 0.8% lower at ₹40.8.

news.title:
IRB Infra shares appeared to crash 50% post 1:1 bonus issue adjustment.
In reality, IRB Infra rallied 11% after turning ex-date for the bonus issue.
news.summary:
IRB Infra shares appeared to crash 50% post 1:1 bonus issue adjustment.
In reality, IRB Infra rallied 11% after turning ex-date for the bonus issue.

news.title:
IRB Infra saw volumes rise 3.72x to 27.85 lakh shares; stock up 8.7% at Rs.22.26.
CCL Products, Aegis Logistics, Welspun Corp, and Garden Reach saw volume surges but mixed price moves.
news.summary:
IRB Infra saw volumes rise 3.72x to 27.85 lakh shares; stock up 8.7% at Rs.22.26.
CCL Products, Aegis Logistics, Welspun Corp, and Garden Reach saw volume surges but mixed price moves.

news.title:
IRB Infra, Triton Valves, B2B Software, and R&B Denims announce bonus shares with record dates in early April.
Bonus ratios: IRB 1:1, Triton 3:1, B2B 1:2, R&B 1:2. Moves aim to reward shareholders, boost liquidity.
news.summary:
IRB Infra, Triton Valves, B2B Software, and R&B Denims announce bonus shares with record dates in early April.
Bonus ratios: IRB 1:1, Triton 3:1, B2B 1:2, R&B 1:2. Moves aim to reward shareholders, boost liquidity.

news.title:
TVS Motor, CRISIL, IREDA, and others to trade ex-dividend next week; TVS Holdings offers highest dividend at ₹86/share.
IRB Infra, Triton Valves announce bonus issues; R B Denims plans bonus and stock split; Gujarat Cotex launches rights issue.
news.summary:
TVS Motor, CRISIL, IREDA, and others to trade ex-dividend next week; TVS Holdings offers highest dividend at ₹86/share.
IRB Infra, Triton Valves announce bonus issues; R B Denims plans bonus and stock split; Gujarat Cotex launches rights issue.

news.title:
IRB Infrastructure Developers Ltd signed a Project Implementation Agreement for TOT-18 with IRB Chandibhadra Tollway Pvt Ltd.
The agreement involves IRB acting as Project Manager under SEBI InvIT Regulations 2014 for the TOT-18 Project.
news.summary:
IRB Infrastructure Developers Ltd signed a Project Implementation Agreement for TOT-18 with IRB Chandibhadra Tollway Pvt Ltd.
The agreement involves IRB acting as Project Manager under SEBI InvIT Regulations 2014 for the TOT-18 Project.

news.title:
IRB reports 22% YoY toll revenue rise in Feb '26, reaching Rs.746 Cr.
Growth driven by traffic and new asset; uplift expected with future additions.
news.summary:
IRB reports 22% YoY toll revenue rise in Feb '26, reaching Rs.746 Cr.
Growth driven by traffic and new asset; uplift expected with future additions.

news.title:
IRB Infra secures ₹3.75B arbitral award against NHAI.
Concession period extended by 582.8 days after arbitration.
news.summary:
IRB Infra secures ₹3.75B arbitral award against NHAI.
Concession period extended by 582.8 days after arbitration.

news.title: IRB Holding, promoter of IRB Infra, acquired 1.5M shares on Feb 25-26.
news.summary: IRB Holding, promoter of IRB Infra, acquired 1.5M shares on Feb 25-26.

news.title:
IRB Infrastructure Developers Ltd releases earnings call transcript per SEBI Regulation 30.
The transcript, from February 16, 2026, is now available on the company's website.
news.summary:

news.title:
CLSA maintains outperform rating on IRB Infra with a target of ₹69.
Target lowered due to reduced EPC expectations from fewer construction-heavy contracts.
news.summary:
CLSA maintains outperform rating on IRB Infra with a target of ₹69.

IRB Infrastructure released Q3FY26 earnings call audio, per SEBI norms.
Audio available on company website, offering insights into management discussion.
news.summary:

news.title: IRB Infra shares declined nearly 5% after weak Q3 results.
news.summary: IRB Infra shares declined nearly 5% after weak Q3 results.

news.title:
IRB Infra projects asset base growth to Rs.1.14 lakh crores by 2030.
Company targets 25% profit CAGR by 2030 for sustained growth.
news.summary:

news.title:
IRB Infra plans to operate and transfer 3-4 toll projects from Jan-Mar.
This move marks a notable operational shift for the company.
news.summary:
IRB Infra plans to operate and transfer 3-4 toll projects from Jan-Mar.

news.title:
IRB Infra reports Q3 EBITDA of 10.2B INR, up from 9.8B YoY.
Q3 EBITDA margin rises to 54.6% from 48.6% YoY.
news.summary:
